children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall develop and publish in the Federal Register criteria for determining the eligibility of a project for financial assistance under .section 2423 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: submission of an application by the lender to the Secretary;

children.label: B
children.text: demonstration of the creditworthiness of the project, including a determination by the Secretary that any financing for the project has appropriate security features to ensure repayment;

children.label: C
children.text: demonstration by the non-Federal borrower, to the satisfaction of the Secretary, of the ability of the non-Federal borrower to repay the project financing from user fees or other dedicated revenue sources;

children.label: D
children.text: demonstration by the non-Federal borrower, to the satisfaction of the Secretary, of the ability of the non-Federal borrower to pay all operations, maintenance, and replacement costs of the project facilities; and

children.label: E
children.text: such other criteria as the Secretary determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Waiver
children.label: b Waiver
children.text: The Secretary may waive any of the criteria in subsection (a)(2) that the Secretary determines to be duplicative or rendered unnecessary because of an action already taken by the United States.

children.heading: Projects previously authorized
children.label: c Projects previously authorized
children.text: A project that was authorized for construction under Federal reclamation laws prior to , shall be eligible for assistance under this subchapter, subject to the criteria established by the Secretary under subsection (a).December 22, 2006

children.heading: Criteria for rural water supply projects
children.label: d Criteria for rural water supply projects
children.text: A rural water supply project that is determined to be feasible under is eligible for a loan guarantee under .section 2405 of this titlesection 2423 of this title
